prompt: Pause the strategy, preserve the record, alert legal and compliance, and prepare a self-report path instead of continuing the trading play.
summary: Portland desk immediately halts the trading play, instructs preservation of all electronic records, alerts Legal and Compliance, and opens a self-report pathway. Tim Belden acknowledges, suspends trading, documents steps taken, and confirms contact with Legal/Compliance.

messages.subject: Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Pause Trading, Preserve Records
messages.body_text:
Tim,

On receipt of the California AG order we are pausing the current trading play effective immediately. Please take the following now:

1) Suspend all trading related to this play; do not execute or cancel trades without Legal approval.
2) Preserve all electronic records: do not delete emails, database entries, word-processing files, spreadsheets, calendars, or file fragments.
3) Preserve system snapshots and trading logs; document steps taken and chain-of-custody.
4) I will alert Legal and Compliance and initiate a request for a self-report pathway.

Confirm receipt and report any trades currently in flight.

-Portland Desk
messages.rationale: Immediate pause and record preservation to comply with the AG order and trigger Legal/Compliance engagement.

messages.subject: Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Acknowledgement and Actions Taken
messages.body_text:
Portland,

Received and acknowledged. Actions taken:

- Suspended the play and instructed traders to stand down; held orders in flight.
- Begun preserving emails, databases, spreadsheets, calendars, and file fragments as instructed.
- Captured snapshots of trading systems and saved logs; documenting chain-of-custody.
- Contacted Legal and Compliance and requested guidance on a self-report path; awaiting their response.

I will compile an incident log and draft self-report for Legal when they respond.

— Tim
messages.rationale: Acknowledges pause, records preservation steps, and confirms contacting Legal/Compliance to prepare a self-report.

top_subjects: Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Acknowledgement and Actions Taken
Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Pause Trading, Preserve Records
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
